creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any reason why we're not sticking to releases? (Use DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION) If not, shouldn't we follow "Example 19. Using USE_GITHUB to Access a Commit Between Two Versions" in Porters Handbook?

var/lib/storage should be /var/db (suggested by zi on IRC)

Doesn't SUB_LIST and PLIST_SUB use = instead of += ?

Can't we handle ownership of storage and cert dir via rc.d script instead?
